description.value:
• Action Cost: [Free] (triggers when creature reduced to 0 HP)
  • Effect: When you reduce a hostile creature to 0 HP, immediately regain Energy equal to your tier (minimum 2), and gain temporary HP equal to your Charisma + tier. Your patron feeds on endings, and so do you.

system.effect: When you reduce a hostile creature to 0 HP, immediately regain Energy equal to your tier (minimum 2), and gain temporary HP equal to your Charisma + tier. Your patron feeds on endings, and so do you.
